about.label: About WRHWFOUR
about.headline:
Your Partner in Professional
IT Infrastructure
paragraphs: WRHWFOUR Private Limited is a leading IT Sales & Services and Computer Hardware Service Provider based out of Pune, India. With a steadfast commitment to reliability and technical excellence, we deliver comprehensive IT infrastructure solutions to corporate clients across the nation.

From hardware procurement and server installations to CCTV surveillance and annual maintenance contracts, our certified engineers ensure that your business technology runs smoothly—anytime, anywhere in India.

services.title: CCTV Installation & Maintenance
services.description: Advanced IP and Analog surveillance systems with remote monitoring capabilities, night vision cameras, and centralized video management.

services.title: Computer / CPU Sales & Repair
services.description: Workstation procurement from top brands and component-level repair services for desktops, laptops, and enterprise computing hardware.

services.title: Server Installation & Maintenance
services.description: Scalable rack and blade server solutions tailored for enterprise workloads with 24/7 uptime monitoring, backup systems, and disaster recovery.

services.title: Biometric Attendance Machines
services.description: Precision fingerprint, facial recognition, and RFID attendance systems with cloud-based reporting for secure corporate environments.

services.title: Corporate IT AMC
services.description: Annual Maintenance Contracts designed for zero downtime and predictable IT budgeting with clearly defined SLA, escalation paths, and periodic health checks.

services.title: Networking Solutions
services.description: Complete LAN/WAN design and setup, fiber optics cabling, robust firewall implementations, VPN configuration, and wireless network optimization.

services.title: Hardware Support for Companies
services.description: On-demand technical support for all peripheral and core IT infrastructure including printers, UPS systems, projectors, and office electronics.

whyUs.label: The WRHWFOUR Advantage
whyUs.headline:
Why Businesses Choose Us as
Their IT Partner
whyUs.subtitle: We don't just fix hardware; we build resilient business ecosystems through elite engineering and strategic IT planning.

features.title: Pan-India Service Support
features.description: Reliable logistics and on-site support across every major Indian city.

features.title: Fast Response & Expert Technicians
features.description: Guaranteed on-site attendance within 4 hours for critical server failures.

features.title: Corporate-Focused IT Solutions
features.description: Solutions designed specifically for the rigorous demands of business environments.

features.title: End-to-End Installation & Maintenance
features.description: From initial consultation and procurement to deployment and ongoing support.

features.title: Reliable Annual Maintenance Contracts
features.description: Transparent contracts with clearly defined SLAs and escalation paths.

features.title: Modern, Secure & Scalable Tech
features.description: Integration of the latest monitoring, security protocols, and scalable solutions.

testimonials.text: WRHWFOUR transformed our office networking infrastructure. Their response time during a critical server crisis was exceptional.
testimonials.author: Rajesh Kumar

testimonials.text: The AMC plan they provided saved us nearly 30% on yearly maintenance costs while drastically improving device longevity.
testimonials.author: Priya Sharma

testimonials.text: From biometric setup across 5 branches to complex enterprise firewall configurations, their team is knowledgeable and professional.
testimonials.author: Amit Mehta
